# Data Model Checklist: Use assessment baseline

**Purpose**: Ensure required entities and fields exist to represent baseline anchoring, adjustments, and provenance.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/016-assessment-baseline/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Assessment baseline entity includes value, year, source/jurisdiction, and assessment unit identifier.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Estimate request captures normalized location and lookup key.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Factor adjustments are represented with category and adjustment value.
- [x] CHK-DM-004 Estimate result includes final estimate and baseline reference.

## Provenance & Warnings

- [x] CHK-DM-005 Provenance fields support repeatability across requests.
- [x] CHK-DM-006 Warning flags cover ambiguous match, fallback, partial features, and guardrails.
- [x] CHK-DM-007 Traceability identifiers (request/correlation IDs) are part of the result model.
